title: iberis microcarpa
intro: Iberis microcarpa, also known as the rock candy or rock cress, is a flowering plant species in the cress family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, Iberis microcarpa has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Iberis microcarpa is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional remedies for its potential healing properties.
